author: Pantelis Monogioudis
text: The semantic graph builder (spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-24-semantic-graph-builder-design.md) is the state representation layer that an Auraison control plane agent needs. The graph (AGE) + vector store (pgvector) provide structured state for LLM reasoning: place coverage, landmark confidence, connectivity gaps. The agent-environment interface should expose: (1) graph state queries (e.g. 'which places have <3 landmarks'), (2) runtime parameter adjustment (epsilon, confidence thresholds), (3) robot command channel (Nav2 goals via Zenoh/rosbridge), (4) success evaluation (re-localization accuracy from random poses). Current pipeline is hardwired — this issue is the bridge to adaptive orchestration.
